Appearances:
Plaintiff Gum Moon Residence is present. Represented by Gloria Tan.
Attorney Francisco Torres appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Kecia Walker is present.
Attorney Aaron Morrison representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem J. Birkelund litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties entered into a signed stipulation that was filed. The trial date of AUG-26-2013 is vacated. (D501)
